publishedAbstract: - OpenShift Container Platform: Ceph-CSI Kernel Module Parameter is not applied.- Due to the issue detailed in [KCS #6617781- MDS crashes In function 'std::ostream& operator < <(std::ostream&, const ClientMetricType&)'](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/6617781) a persistent kernel parameter must be applied the the Worker nodes which make use of the CephFS storage in an `OpenShift` cluster.- In this case the parameter applied is `disable_send_metrics` but the solution in this KCS can be applied generaly for Kernel modules which need a parameter set in OpenShift environments.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Container Platform Ceph-CSI Kernel Module Parameter is not applied.
